title: plagiocheilus peduncularis
intro: Plagiocheilus peduncularis, also known as the creeping oxalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its oxalic acid content. The health benefits of Plagiocheilus peduncularis include its ability to aid in digestive issues and relieve symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties in traditional medicine.
